turns.query: Analyze pollution levels and emission impacts between Ligong station and North Pump House station on 2025-06-25, considering nearby enterprise activities.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先查找Ligong站和North Pump House站的信息
query_stations = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%Ligong%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%Ligong%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%理工%'
   OR aqs.name LIKE '%North Pump House%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%North Pump%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%北泵%'
LIMIT 20
""")
stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print("相关站点信息：")
print(stations_df[['id', 'name', 'district_name', 'city_name']])

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 扩大搜索范围，查找所有包含"理工"或"Ligong"的站点
query_ligong = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%理工%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%Ligong%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%LIGONG%'
LIMIT 20
""")
ligong_df = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
print("Ligong相关站点：")
print(ligong_df)

# 查找北泵房站
query_pumphouse = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%泵房%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%Pump%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%北泵%'
LIMIT 20
""")
pumphouse_df = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)
print("\n北泵房相关站点：")
print(pumphouse_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 列出所有站点名称，查找Ligong相关站点
query_all_stations = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
ORDER BY aqs.name
LIMIT 100
""")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
print("所有站点（前100个）：")
print(all_stations[['id', 'name', 'district_name', 'city_name']])

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索所有包含"Ligong"或"理工"的站点
query_ligong = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE LOWER(aqs.name) LIKE '%ligong%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%理工%'
""")
ligong_df = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
print("Ligong站点：")
print(ligong_df)

# 如果没找到，尝试搜索所有站点名称
query_all = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
""")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
print(f"\n总站点数: {len(all_stations)}")
print("站点名称列表：")
print(all_stations['name'].tolist())

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查找Ligong站
query_ligong = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE LOWER(aqs.name) LIKE '%ligong%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%理工%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%大学%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%学院%'
LIMIT 50
""")
ligong_df = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
print("Ligong相关站点：")
print(ligong_df[['id', 'name', 'district_name', 'city_name']])

# 确认北泵房站
query_pumphouse = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.name LIKE '%泵房%' OR aqs.name LIKE '%Pump%'
LIMIT 10
""")
pumphouse_df = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)
print("\n北泵房相关站点：")
print(pumphouse_df[['id', 'name', 'district_name', 'city_name']])

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 确认Ligong站（河北工业大学）和North Pump House站（北泵房）的详细信息
query_station_info = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.id IN (333, 238)
""")
station_info = pd.read_sql(query_station_info, engine)
print("目标站点信息：")
print(station_info[['id', 'name', 'district_name', 'city_name']])

# 计算2025-06-25 Ligong站（河北工业大学，ID: 333）的PM2.5和AQI平均值
query_ligong_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(hsaq.pm2_5), 2) as mean_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(hsaq.aqi), 2) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality hsaq
WHERE hsaq.station_id = 333
  AND hsaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND hsaq.timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")
ligong_stats = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_stats, engine)
print("\nLigong站（河北工业大学）2025-06-25统计：")
print(ligong_stats)

# 计算2025-06-25 North Pump House站（北泵房，ID: 238）的PM2.5和AQI平均值
query_pumphouse_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(hsaq.pm2_5), 2) as mean_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(hsaq.aqi), 2) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality hsaq
WHERE hsaq.station_id = 238
  AND hsaq.timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND hsaq.timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")
pumphouse_stats = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_stats, engine)
print("\nNorth Pump House站（北泵房）2025-06-25统计：")
print(pumphouse_stats)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查询Ligong站（河北工业大学，ID: 333）2025-06-25的PM2.5和AQI平均值
query_ligong = text("""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) as mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 333
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")
ligong_df = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
mean_pm25_ligong = float(ligong_df['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]) if not ligong_df.empty and pd.notna(ligong_df['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]) else 0.0
mean_aqi_ligong = float(ligong_df['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]) if not ligong_df.empty and pd.notna(ligong_df['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]) else 0.0
print(f"Ligong站 PM2.5均值: {mean_pm25_ligong}, AQI均值: {mean_aqi_ligong}")

# 查询North Pump House站（北泵房，ID: 238）2025-06-25的PM2.5和AQI平均值
query_pumphouse = text("""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) as mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = 238
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")
pumphouse_df = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)
mean_pm25_pumphouse = float(pumphouse_df['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]) if not pumphouse_df.empty and pd.notna(pumphouse_df['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]) else 0.0
mean_aqi_pumphouse = float(pumphouse_df['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]) if not pumphouse_df.empty and pd.notna(pumphouse_df['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]) else 0.0
print(f"North Pump House站 PM2.5均值: {mean_pm25_pumphouse}, AQI均值: {mean_aqi_pumphouse}")
